_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-014 (DA, cosine: 0.584), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.572). Shared vocabulary: [chain, knowledge, security, supply]. DCWF-only terms [information, management, policies, procedures, requirements, risk] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.900, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.7%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk manageme" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.603 ≈ STS 0.572 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [chain, knowledge, security, supply] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.4%. Shared tokens: [chain, knowledge, security, supply]. DCWF-only: [information, management, policies, procedures, requirements, risk]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model].
